ec2.networkaclentry.icmp.Code.Description: The Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) code. You can use -1 to specify all ICMP codes for the given ICMP type. Requirement is conditional: Required if you specify 1 (ICMP) for the protocol parameter.

ec2.networkaclentry.icmp.Type.Description: The Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) type. You can use -1 to specify all ICMP types. Conditional requirement: Required if you specify 1 (ICMP) for the `CreateNetworkAclEntry` protocol parameter.
